fragment_metadata_check.name: fragment_metadata_check
fragment_metadata_check.value:
CASE 
                WHEN metadata->>'type' = 'fragment' THEN
                    metadata ? 'documentId' AND 
                    metadata ? 'position'
                ELSE true
            END

document_metadata_check.name: document_metadata_check
document_metadata_check.value:
CASE 
                WHEN metadata->>'type' = 'document' THEN
                    metadata ? 'timestamp'
                ELSE true
            END

vertex_model_assignments_scope_owner_che.name: vertex_model_assignments_scope_owner_check
vertex_model_assignments_scope_owner_che.value:
(
        ("vertex_model_assignments"."scope" = 'global' and "vertex_model_assignments"."organization_id" is null and "vertex_model_assignments"."user_id" is null) or
        ("vertex_model_assignments"."scope" = 'organization' and "vertex_model_assignments"."organization_id" is not null and "vertex_model_assignments"."user_id" is null) or
        ("vertex_model_assignments"."scope" = 'user' and "vertex_model_assignments"."organization_id" is not null and "vertex_model_assignments"."user_id" is not null)
      )

vertex_tuned_models_scope_owner_check.name: vertex_tuned_models_scope_owner_check
vertex_tuned_models_scope_owner_check.value:
(
        ("vertex_tuned_models"."source_scope" = 'global' and "vertex_tuned_models"."organization_id" is null and "vertex_tuned_models"."user_id" is null) or
        ("vertex_tuned_models"."source_scope" = 'organization' and "vertex_tuned_models"."organization_id" is not null and "vertex_tuned_models"."user_id" is null) or
        ("vertex_tuned_models"."source_scope" = 'user' and "vertex_tuned_models"."organization_id" is not null and "vertex_tuned_models"."user_id" is not null)
      )
